risk_description: Critical business systems become unavailable, preventing users from accessing essential applications and services. This includes email systems, ERP, CRM, and other core business applications.
mitigation_strategies: Implement redundancy, regular backups, failover systems, and monitoring alerts. Establish incident response procedures and communication protocols.

risk_description: Unauthorized access to sensitive data including customer information, financial records, or intellectual property. May result from phishing, malware, or system vulnerabilities.
mitigation_strategies: Implement multi-factor authentication, regular security audits, employee training, encryption, and access controls. Deploy intrusion detection systems.

risk_description: Systems or applications experience slow performance, affecting user productivity and business operations. May be caused by resource constraints, network issues, or software problems.
mitigation_strategies: Regular performance monitoring, capacity planning, optimization of code and queries, infrastructure scaling, and load balancing.

risk_description: Improper access controls allowing users to access resources or data beyond their authorization level. Includes privilege escalation and unauthorized permission changes.
mitigation_strategies: Implement role-based access control (RBAC), regular access reviews, principle of least privilege, and automated provisioning/deprovisioning.

risk_description: Loss of critical business data due to hardware failure, human error, software bugs, or malicious activity. May result in business disruption and compliance violations.
mitigation_strategies: Implement automated backups, version control, disaster recovery plans, and data retention policies. Regular backup testing and validation.

risk_description: Failure to comply with industry regulations, data protection laws, or internal policies. May result in fines, legal action, or reputational damage.
mitigation_strategies: Regular compliance audits, policy enforcement, employee training, automated compliance monitoring, and documentation management.
compliance_requirements: GDPR, HIPAA, SOX, PCI-DSS, Industry-specific regulations

risk_description: Failure of system integrations or APIs causing data synchronization issues, workflow disruptions, or service unavailability.
mitigation_strategies: Implement robust error handling, monitoring and alerting, retry mechanisms, and fallback procedures. Regular integration testing.

risk_description: Malicious or negligent actions by employees, contractors, or partners that compromise security or data integrity.
mitigation_strategies: User behavior analytics, access monitoring, data loss prevention (DLP), background checks, and security awareness training.

risk_description: Software bugs or defects causing application errors, data corruption, or system instability.
mitigation_strategies: Rigorous testing, code reviews, continuous integration/deployment, bug tracking, and regular updates and patches.
compliance_requirements: Software development standards, Quality assurance policies

risk_description: Network connectivity issues preventing access to systems, applications, or internet services. Includes VPN, WiFi, and WAN problems.
mitigation_strategies: Network redundancy, monitoring and alerting, regular maintenance, capacity planning, and backup connectivity options.

risk_description: Ransomware attack encrypting critical data and systems, demanding payment for decryption keys.
mitigation_strategies: Regular backups, email filtering, endpoint protection, user training, network segmentation, and incident response plan.

risk_description: Physical hardware failures including servers, storage devices, network equipment, or end-user devices.
mitigation_strategies: Hardware redundancy, regular maintenance, monitoring, spare parts inventory, and replacement planning.

risk_description: Email service disruptions affecting communication, including delivery failures, spam issues, or mailbox problems.
mitigation_strategies: Email system redundancy, spam filtering, mailbox management, monitoring, and alternative communication channels.

risk_description: Weak passwords, password sharing, or compromised credentials leading to unauthorized access.
mitigation_strategies: Strong password policies, multi-factor authentication, password managers, regular password changes, and security awareness training.

risk_description: Printer malfunctions, driver issues, or print queue problems affecting document printing.
mitigation_strategies: Regular printer maintenance, driver updates, print server monitoring, and user training.

risk_description: Issues with software installation, updates, or licensing affecting user productivity.
mitigation_strategies: Automated software deployment, testing before rollout, license management, and user support.

risk_description: Mobile device issues including connectivity, synchronization, or application problems.
mitigation_strategies: Mobile device management (MDM), regular updates, user training, and support procedures.

risk_description: Attempts to manipulate users into divulging confidential information or performing actions that compromise security.
mitigation_strategies: Security awareness training, email filtering, reporting mechanisms, and incident response procedures.

risk_description: Database performance problems, corruption, or connectivity issues affecting applications and data access.
mitigation_strategies: Database monitoring, regular maintenance, backups, performance tuning, and high availability configurations.

risk_description: Cloud service disruptions or configuration issues affecting SaaS applications or cloud infrastructure.
mitigation_strategies: Multi-cloud strategy, service monitoring, SLA management, and backup procedures.
compliance_requirements: Cloud security standards, Data residency requirements
